changed: Changed notion autosave to a true idle debounce of about 1 second.
Added Ctrl+S / Cmd+S immediate save in notion view.
Added a custom work video seek bar with click seek and hover preview support when preview assets are present.
Added desktop resize modes for public works detail videos.
notChanged: Backend preview generation was not reworked beyond the current preview asset pipeline.
Native browser video controls remain in place; the custom seek bar is additive.

validations.command: npx vitest run src/test/blog-notion-workspace.test.tsx src/test/work-video-player.test.tsx src/test/auth-csrf.test.ts
PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/ui-admin-notion-autosave-info.spec.ts tests/public-work-videos.spec.ts --workers=1

risks: Hover preview quality is still limited by current backend preview asset generation in some environments.
The custom seek bar is supplementary rather than a full custom player replacement.
recommendation: Keep this pass and only pursue backend preview pipeline upgrades if richer scrub previews are still needed.
